_comment: Per-role LLM routing. Two backends: 'ollama' (default — JSON-only fast roles) and 'vllm' (qwen3:30b base + hot-swappable LoRA adapter per request). When backend='vllm' is unavailable, the router silently falls back to Ollama with the base model and NO adapter — see docs/VLLM_SERVING.md ('Fallback behavior'). The legacy flat 'role: model' shape is preserved as a default so existing callers in shark.graph (which read this file directly with _load_model_tiers) keep working unchanged.

routing._comment: Per-role backend + model/adapter selection consumed by shark.llm.client.resolve_role_route(). When a role is missing from this map, the router falls back to the flat 'role: model' table above on Ollama.
